new_string:
/// 중첩 표 (셀 안의 셀) 내부 문단에 텍스트 삽입.
    ///
    /// 반환: JSON `{"ok":true,"charOffset":<N>}`
    #[wasm_bindgen(js_name = insertTextInNestedCell)]
    pub fn insert_text_in_nested_cell(
        &mut self,
        section_idx: u32,
        parent_para_idx: u32,
        outer_ctrl_idx: u32,
        outer_cell_idx: u32,
        outer_cell_para_idx: u32,
        inner_ctrl_idx: u32,
        inner_cell_idx: u32,
        inner_cell_para_idx: u32,
        char_offset: u32,
        text: &str,
    ) -> Result<String, JsValue> {
        self.insert_text_in_nested_cell_native(
            section_idx as usize,
            parent_para_idx as usize,
            outer_ctrl_idx as usize,
            outer_cell_idx as usize,
            outer_cell_para_idx as usize,
            inner_ctrl_idx as usize,
            inner_cell_idx as usize,
            inner_cell_para_idx as usize,
            char_offset as usize,
            text,
        ).map_err(|e| e.into())
    }
